name: 岂有此理
overview: Gu Bei, a college slacker, transmigrates into the body of a frontier officer and enjoys a carefree life for three years. Summoned back to the capital by imperial decree, he finds his former roommate, Xiao Ce, now the emperor. Together, they apply modern thinking to outsmart corrupt officials, combat criminal masterminds, and defend the empire, all while generating a series of comedic and action-packed adventures.
